---
title: "Citation and Licensing"
tag: license
bibliography: 
  - ie-references.bib
  - ie-books.bib
link-citations: true
---


:::{.use-share-remix .banner-spacer}
:::

:::{.center}
[![][cc-by-nc-sa-shield]][cc-by-nc-sa]

[![][cc-by-nc-sa-image]][cc-by-nc-sa]
:::

[cc-by-nc-sa]: http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/
[cc-by-nc-sa-image]: https://licensebuttons.net/l/by-nc-sa/4.0/88x31.png
[cc-by-nc-sa-shield]: https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC%20BY--NC--SA%204.0-lightgrey.svg


Integrated Ethics Labs provides materials licensed under a
[**Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License**][cc-by-nc-sa].

We want you to use these materials, which might mean modifying them to suit your purposes. 
Our CC BY-NC-SA license should support you in this. You can read the details by following the links above,
but here are the main points:

You are free to:

* **Share** — copy and redistribute the material in any medium or format

* **Adapt** — remix, transform, and build upon the material

subject to these restrictions:

* **NonCommercial** — You may not use the material for commercial purposes.

* **ShareAlike** — If you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you must distribute your contributions under the same license as the original.

* **Attribution** — You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the
license, and indicate if changes were made. You may do so in any reasonable
manner, but not in any way that suggests the licensor endorses you or your use.


Cite this project using @Carter:2019 or give attribution by referring to Integrated Ethics Labs and providing a link to the website [integratedethicslabs.org](https://integratedethicslabs.org).  When citing individual labs, please cite the lab's author(s) and the lab's title along with the Integrated Ethics Labs project citation.
